rationale: z3 returned unknown because the two `SingleDelivery::receive(pre_self_@, post_i, pkt@, r_i.get_ack()@, r_i.get_abstracted_ack_set())` ensures are unfolded along disjoint `(post, ack, acks)` chains and never share a trigger.
